脊髓損傷的臨床表徵，會依受傷部位不同而有所不同，常見的症狀可分為脊髓休克與神經性休克。脊髓休克即病灶部位以下喪失所有的反射、運動、感覺及自主神經活動，造成呼吸困難、低血壓、心跳過慢、麻痺性腸阻塞、尿液滯留。神經性休克，主要是因交感神經衝動無法傳出，使周邊血管擴張、心輸出量減少，而呈現神經休克狀態。

以一個RN睇蘋果live角度分析：

據First aider所講，曾經嘔過、話頸痛、依家變左deep coma(深層昏迷）, GCS: 3/15，脈搏一路下跌，氣喘，要聞最高濃度100% oxygen mask，呢d完全係spinal cord injury（脊髓受傷）既表徵，如果愈接近頭頸位置，輕則四肢癱瘓，重則傷到個控制呼吸個part，直頭會唔識呼吸，然後就死亡

係醫院呢d情況完全係超危急既情況，要即刻搵醫生，甚至ICU，要插喉protect airway。

同埋最重要一點, 班狗一直堅持拒絕幫男仔鬆手扣，可以肯定係一定會加劇個spinal cord injury既傷勢，令到傷上加傷，本身唔洗癱都會變植物人咁解

死黑警，依家下下重手到攞人命，黑警無一個係無辜，屌你老母！

quote.msg:
以一個RN睇蘋果live角度分析：

據First aider所講，曾經嘔過、話頸痛、依家變左deep coma(深層昏迷）, GCS: 3/15，脈搏一路下跌，氣喘，要聞最高濃度100% oxygen mask，呢d完全係spinal cord injury（脊髓受傷）既表徵，如果愈接近頭頸位置，輕則四肢癱瘓，重則傷到個控制呼吸個part，直頭會唔識呼吸，然後就死亡

係醫院呢d情況完全係超危急既情況，要即刻搵醫生，甚至ICU，要插喉protect airway。

同埋最重要一點, 班狗一直堅持拒絕幫男仔鬆手扣，可以肯定係一定會加劇個spinal cord injury既傷勢，令到傷上加傷，本身唔洗癱都會變植物人咁解

死黑警，依家下下重手到攞人命，黑警無一個係無辜，屌你老母！

以一個RN睇蘋果live角度分析：

據First aider所講，曾經嘔過、話頸痛、依家變左deep coma(深層昏迷）, GCS: 3/15，脈搏一路下跌，氣喘，要聞最高濃度100% oxygen mask，呢d完全係spinal cord injury（脊髓受傷）既表徵，如果愈接近頭頸位置，輕則四肢癱瘓，重則傷到個控制呼吸個part，直頭會唔識呼吸，然後就死亡

係醫院呢d情況完全係超危急既情況，要即刻搵醫生，甚至ICU，要插喉protect airway。

同埋最重要一點, 班狗一直堅持拒絕幫男仔鬆手扣，可以肯定係一定會加劇個spinal cord injury既傷勢，令到傷上加傷，本身唔洗癱都會變植物人咁解

香港人醒啦

中央「三春袋」不能碰

中國國務院港澳辦發言人楊光29日表示，一國兩制是個完整概念，一國是本、是根，根生才能葉茂，有三條底線不能觸碰，一是絕不允許任何危害國家主權安全行為、絕不允許挑戰中央權力、絕不允許香港對內地進行滲透破壞，他強調這三條紅線不可觸碰。

楊光頭兩點都有話香港。
但值得留意，楊光講話沒有更多涉及官方絕不允許香港對內地進行滲透破壞的內容。
呢個我地睇到中共根本唔會理外國點諗，三條紅線無一條係勾結外國勢力。因為佢地同我地都知道外國係好難好難出兵幫香港。

《星星之火，可以燎原》，原名《時局估量和紅軍行動問題》是中國共產黨紅四軍收到中共中央的「二月來信」後，林彪給毛澤東寫信，毛澤東回覆的一封公開信

Hong Kong police attempted murder and interfered first aider from saving the victim.

Around hours ago, a male (around 16, according to live) was attacked by six policemen with no attempt to charge or irritate the police in Prince Edward mtr station. The victim lost consciousness immediately. First aider arrived and found that victim had shortness or breath, obvious swelling in neck region, blood in mouth with no wound(meaning that it could be internal).

First aider told police this is a suspected cervical fracture case which spinal cord could be damaged. First aider request the police to unlock the handcuff and let him loosen the shirt of victim but was rejected by the police, saying that the cloth is an important evidence.

The pulse of the victim keep dropping and firefighters finally arrived at least 10 mins later and request the same action as first aider did and this time the police finally did so. Before that the police moved and turn the suspected cervical fracture victim who was obviously in comma.

Victim was now believed to be admitted to the KWH, no one can confirm since the police stopped the reporters to follow and blocked them inside the station.

This could only be the tip of the iceberg of how police have been deliberately using excessive and unnecessary force to attack protestors and stopping the reporters to get the real picture.

Please save us.

quote.msg:
Hong Kong police attempted murder and interfered first aider from saving the victim.

Around hours ago, a male (around 16, according to live) was attacked by six policemen with no attempt to charge or irritate the police in Prince Edward mtr station. The victim lost consciousness immediately. First aider arrived and found that victim had shortness or breath, obvious swelling in neck region, blood in mouth with no wound(meaning that it could be internal).

First aider told police this is a suspected cervical fracture case which spinal cord could be damaged. First aider request the police to unlock the handcuff and let him loosen the shirt of victim but was rejected by the police, saying that the cloth is an important evidence.

The pulse of the victim keep dropping and firefighters finally arrived at least 10 mins later and request the same action as first aider did and this time the police finally did so. Before that the police moved and turn the suspected cervical fracture victim who was obviously in comma.

Victim was now believed to be admitted to the KWH, no one can confirm since the police stopped the reporters to follow and blocked them inside the station.

This could only be the tip of the iceberg of how police have been deliberately using excessive and unnecessary force to attack protestors and stopping the reporters to get the real picture.

Please save us.

First aider arrived and found that victim had shortness or breath, obvious swelling in neck region, blood in mouth with no wound(meaning that it could be internal).

First aider told police this is a suspected cervical fracture case which spinal cord could be damaged. First aider request the police to unlock the handcuff and let him loosen the shirt of victim but was rejected by the police, saying that the cloth is an important evidence.

The pulse of the victim keep dropping and firefighters finally arrived at least 10 mins later and request the same action as first aider did and this time the police finally did so. Before that the police moved and turn the suspected cervical fracture victim who was obviously in comma.

Victim was now believed to be admitted to the KWH, no one can confirm since the police stopped the reporters to follow and blocked them inside the station.

This could only be the tip of the iceberg of how police have been deliberately using excessive and unnecessary force to attack protestors and stopping the reporters to get the real picture.

Please save us.
